title: AIP Witness Attestation (v1)
description: Third-party signed statement that a transparency manifest of another operator was observed (Door #3). A witness signs the (target_operator_id, target_manifest_sequence, target_manifest_hash, statement, witnessed_at) tuple with their own ed25519 key; receptors recompute 'attestation_hash' as SHA-256(JCS(attestation minus 'attestation_hash' and 'signature')) and verify the signature against the witness public key whose SHA-256(DER SPKI) equals 'witness_public_key_fingerprint'. The witness key is independent of the target operator's key — that is the entire point of witnessing.

witness_operator_id.description: Identifier of the witness operator. Different from target_operator_id.

witness_public_key_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 hex of the DER SPKI of the witness's ed25519 public key.

target_operator_id.description: Operator whose manifest is being witnessed.

target_manifest_hash.description: manifest_hash of the witnessed manifest. The witness is binding their statement to this exact content; if the manifest is later modified, the witness signature no longer matches.

statement.description: Free-text witness statement (e.g. 'independent third-party verification'). Included in 'attestation_hash'.

signature.description: ed25519 signature by the witness over JCS(attestation minus 'attestation_hash' and 'signature'). 128 hex chars.

attestation_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of JCS(attestation minus 'attestation_hash'). Recomputed by verifiers.
